response.justification: Bogdan is technically a strong match for the stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, REST APIs, and cloud infra are all well-represented across his 15+ years of experience. However, the role is explicitly entry-to-mid level, and Bogdan is a Staff/Senior engineer who has built distributed systems handling millions of requests per second, founded a geo-data platform, and contributed to AI-agent infrastructure. This is a significant overqualification mismatch that raises retention risk and salary expectation gaps. The on-site requirement may also be an issue given the San Francisco location listed on the resume despite the Berlin phone number. If the team is open to a senior hire or if Bogdan has a specific reason for targeting this level, a screening call is warranted.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise directly matching the core stack requirements
Proven full-stack delivery across frontend (React), backend (Node/NestJS-adjacent), and infrastructure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
LLM and AI-agent integration experience at re:cinq directly satisfies the nice-to-have requirements
concerns: Severe overqualification: Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years being considered for an entry-level role creates high attrition and misaligned expectations risk
PostgreSQL not mentioned anywhere; database experience is MongoDB and general SQL/MySQL, which may require a ramp-up on the preferred stack
Geographic ambiguity: resume lists San Francisco but has a German phone number and Berlin employers — high on-site presence requirement needs explicit clarification
